hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *.py) python3 -m py_compile "$f" 2>&1 | head -10 ;; esac; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in */scripts/_*.py) base=$(basename "$f" .py); test_file="$(dirname "$f")/test_${base#_}.py"; if [ -f "$test_file" ]; then echo "\u2192 Running $(basename "$test_file")..."; python3 -m pytest "$test_file" -x --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -25; fi ;; esac; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push.*(main|master)|gcloud[[:space:]].*delete|rm -rf /opt|DROP TABLE|TRUNCATE TABLE'; then echo '\ud83d\udeab BLOCKED: production-affecting command. If intentional, run manually outside Claude Code.' >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0
